case_title: WEEKEND SHERPA LLC VS. WAG HOTELS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY WEEKEND SHERPA LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WAG HOTELS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEEKEND SHERPA LLC AS TO DEFENDANT WAG HOTELS, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEEKEND SHERPA LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAG HOTELS, INC. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,060.00, DEFENDANT WAG HOTELS, INC. NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEEKEND SHERPA LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-18-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WAG HOTELS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
